positive: Minimalist geometric abstract mural art, featuring interwoven pattern of stylized celestial bodies, crescent moons, constellations, and abstract planetary orbits. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, dusty sapphire, muted teal, and accents of shimmering gold foil. Composition must be radially balanced and highly scalable, creating a striking, seamless-edge repeat pattern suitable for apparel textiles. Use strong, clean vector lines and subtle halftone dot effects for depth. Dramatic, high-contrast silhouette style, rendered with sophisticated graphic design flair, on a light, off-white background.
